samples:
I close my eyes and see
The images of your face
And hear you tell me now
Your name is death
Death has come for me


Death comes to take a part of me
It crushes, destroys, devours me inside
Death wants all that it destroys, I pray
Take it all from me!


Destroyed by time, space and matter
Destruction can't be stopped or undone
But we have to try our best to understand
Why we were born in the first place
We will never know why
This force called life exists!


Death comes to take a part of me
It crushes, destroys, devours me inside
Death wants all that it destroys, I pray
Take it all from me!


Destroyed by time, space and matter
Destruction can't be stopped or undone
But we have to try our best to understand
Why we were born in the first place
We will never know why
This force called life exists!

Don't go there
Go and learn
I don't know why
But it feels so strange


Now I understand
Why I felt the need to create this
New world of light
And leave reality behind me



Open your mind
Enter a new dimension
Feel all alone when you find yourself here
On your own


Leave behind confusion, pain and sorrow
Lost in darkness for long time too long
The light is here now ! 
The answers are on their way ! 


What was right ? What was wrong?  !
Was that  even real ? 


Leave behind confusion, pain and sorrow
Lost in darkness for long time too long
The light is here now ! !
The answers are on their way ! ! 

In the maze of illusions you were lost   
Get ready to face reality 


Open your mind
Enter a new dimension
Feel all alone when you find yourself here
On your own ! 

Leave behind confusion, pain and sorrow
Lost in darkness for long time too long
The light is here now ! !
The answers are on their way ! !

I'm stuck in time
Lost and alone
So long ago
When I was young

I remember my father telling me stories about his life
A hero, a legend, my father he was
Those days gone now, but they live on inside me
The great master painter of all times
Paint the picture that is mine to paint

Don't forget to tell yourself
That you are important
Your attention is needed here
Don't let the devil destroy it

Every day for the rest of your life
Give everything you've got until the end
Find your inner strength and fight
Against those who want you down


Wake up
You're falling so low
Wake up
Get off the ground

We'll never be like them
They will try their best to crush us
But we overcome our fears
And grow even stronger


Paint the picture
With colours bright
In honour of the master painter
Of all times
Paint the picture

You are the only one
That you can trust right now
For we have fallen so low
Against nature, against God


You want to change your fate?
Do what it takes!


Your mind is clear as glass
When seeing how sick this world has become
It's killing us all inside
Don't think twice, just do it!

Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind


I am ready to fight
Ready to protect what is mine
From those who destroy
What should be our pride
We must not bow down in front of stone
Destroyed by greed and corruption
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind
Change our ways
And find a better way for mankind

I'm ready to reveal myself
I'll fly right out of this cage
So don't get in my way, you cannot see me now


A lion's roar, a thunder storm
From the mountain top we call home
Don't bow down low and pray for rain
We're the pride of our nation


On our side is the law of the jungle
In front of us lies a better land
Don't lock yourself inside your shell
Get ready to fight


Don't want to believe that I am blind
All along these years of torture
You said respect the rights of others
But what about yours? What about mine?


Don't get in my way, you cannot see me now


On our side is the law of the jungle
In front of us lies a better land
Don't lock yourself inside your shell
Get ready to fight


On our side is the law of the jungle
In front of us lies a better land
Don't lock yourself inside your shell
Get ready to fight

My attention span is very short
And I cannot wait to forget all of this
Get out my way and let me pass through
I've been wasting time for nothing now
So long, so long


Try as hard as I can
To find the words that can express what I feel
Cannot get them out at will
If I could only understand 
This kind of torture for life


Injustice has its laws
Some people are born evil
Others suffer from a bad state of mind
But there is no cure whatsoever


Try as hard as I can
To find the words that can express what I feel
Cannot get them out at will
If I could only understand 
This kind of torture for life

The law of the circle is true
You reap what you sow
Don't try to fool yourself anymore
All along just fight your fears!

Open wide your eyes and see
Now look straight into reason!
Find strength within yourself
And put an end to this pain!

Dream of a better life
In the land of opportunity
Leave my fears behind me
And never return again


Don't want to get too serious about it now
But I can see what you mean
Wake up, dream awake!

You may think I'm crazy
Cause I talk to myself sometimes
Against the laws of nature
On my own, time will come and go
Against the rules of physics
My vision is so clear I can feel
A presence near me

Don't want to get too serious about it now
But I can see what you mean
Wake up, dream awake!

When they tell me: "Open your eyes"
I understand why they say this
Close your fist around the world
Put all your strength into this fight

Don't want to get too serious about it now
But I can see what you mean
Wake up, dream awake!

Wake up, dream awake!


Wake up, dream awake!

In a maze of confusion
Lost, my strength is gone
But I will overcome


Life's struggle, the battle
The fight against myself
My mind was shattered into pieces
I see them trying to destroy me
So I must try harder not to get crushed


Wake up and fight! Wake up and fight!
Break away from this pressure
Don't let it crush your soul!

All alone in this cage
A lion locked inside an
Old corroded bucket


Outbreak, release
Fire from within
Blow them all away now!

Wake up and fight! Wake up and fight!
Break away from this pressure
Don't let it crush your soul!

Face reality, break the code
This cage is made of steel
Break through the wall
And fly away


Wake up and fight! Wake up and fight!
Break away from this pressure
Don't let it crush your soul!

Wake up and fight! Wake up and fight!
Break away from this pressure
Don't let it crush your soul!

Leave me alone and leave me the way I am
Don't destroy my mind by taking full control
Don't get so close to me, now that you know me
You will destroy me 'cause I cannot help myself

How could I ever understand your vision for me?
I don't want this anymore


All along I thought it was better but now
Destruction is all I see around me
The pain became too much to bear and now I must face the facts
I can feel it in my bones

It's killing me inside


Destroy me
Destruction is all I see around me
Destruction is all I see around me

Destruction is all I see around me
Destruction is all I see around me

Destruction is all I see around me
Destruction is all I see around me
Destruction is all I see around me
Destruction is all I see around me

Destruction is all I see around me
Destruction is all I see around me

Wake up, it's time to pray
And dig into your soul
Don't let the vultures eat you alive
Until the end of days
Get ready for the fight


Put your pride aside and kneel down
Surrender to this force called love
You may not understand what's going on
But you know that now there is a reason why you live

Pray until the end of time
I pray and pray until the end of time


Don't waste my attention with false promises
Tell me how long will I have
To grow old in flesh and bones?
Not long at all!

Put your pride aside and kneel down
Surrender to this force called love
You may not understand what's going on
But you know that now there is a reason why you live

Pray until the end of time
I pray and pray until the end of time
Pray until the end of time
I pray and pray until the end of time
Pray until the end of time
I pray and pray until the end of time
